user.title: SAIH Ebro
user.description:
Configure access to the SAIH Ebro Open Data API.

If you do not have an API Key yet, you can request access here:
- https://www.saihebro.com/datos/opendata
- https://www.saihebro.com/usuarios/registro (write in the Remarks field that you want access to the Open Data API).

error.invalid_api_key: Unable to validate the API Key. Please check it.
